• Generates ASCII wave animations that follow mouse movement
  • Uses a monospace font grid to render wave patterns with characters
  • Implements performance optimizations with bounding box calculations and single DOM updates
    const CHARS = '@#S%?*+;:,. ';
    const WAVE_DURATION = 800;

This web application creates dynamic ASCII art wave animations that respond to mouse movement. The animation uses a grid of monospace characters that ripple outward from the cursor position, creating an interactive visual effect with optimized rendering performance.
